intent: Find the single best-matching product on the One Stop Market that simultaneously satisfies: (a) keyword 'backpack' appears in the name, (b) price ≤ $100, (c) rating ≥ 4.0. Among candidates meeting all three, pick the one with the highest rating (break ties by lowest price). Report its name, price, rating, product_url, and a 1-sentence rationale.
author_notes: Multi-constraint search; selection rule is explicit so there is a deterministic winner.
